scripts.build: vite build && cp public/*.html dist/ && cp public/manifest.json dist/ 2>/dev/null; node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/_routes.json', JSON.stringify({version:1,include:['/_worker.js','/api/*','/favicon.ico','/manifest.json'],exclude:['/fan','/fan.html','/organiser','/organiser.html','/venue','/venue.html','/event-manager','/event-manager.html','/admin','/admin.html','/ops','/ops.html','/brand','/brand.html','/portals','/portals.html','/architecture','/architecture.html','/architecture-spec','/architecture-spec.html','/developer','/developer.html','/sw.js']}))"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name webapp
